shared_attributes.hitbox_margin: 3px smaller than sprite on all sides

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring player to jump, wider than small variant
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=0px (ground level), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Common obstacle from game start (0+ points), spawned by SpawnSystem with 35% probability, requires jump with slightly longer airtime

visual_specification.shape: Two vertical cacti grouped together, double width of small variant
visual_specification.texture: Pixel art, hard edges, spiky protrusions on both cacti
visual_specification.details: Two desert cacti side by side, each with visible spikes, combined into single obstacle sprite, wider footprint than small variant

relationships.shared_with: Same color and style as cactus_small and cactus_large, same height (70px) as cactus_small
relationships.differences_from: cactus_small is 34px wide (1 cactus), cactus_large is 102px wide and 100px tall (3 cacti). Medium is 2x width of small

explicit_negations: No animation or movement beyond scrolling
No transparency except full alpha channel
No spacing between the two cacti (single unified sprite)
